Operation 'lookupPayment' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary uses parenthetical notation which is less clear for AI agents. Description lacks specificity about what status information is returned and doesn't clarify that this is a read-only lookup operation. Enhanced version specifies input requirements (pidx), output details (transaction details, amount, payment state), and clarifies the operation's read-only nature and use case (reconciliation). This improves AI agent interpretability for determining when to use this operation in payment verification workflows.

data.current_description: Verify the status of a payment using the pidx identifier received during payment initiation.
data.summary_suggestion: Verify payment status using payment identifier
data.description_suggestion: Verify the status of a completed payment transaction using the pidx (payment identifier) received during payment initiation. Accepts the pidx as input and returns detailed payment status information including transaction details, amount, and payment state. This operation does not modify any payment data and is used to confirm payment completion and retrieve transaction details for reconciliation purposes.
